title: Add runRuffCheck helper to datum-tdd-act-lane.ts
description: Implement the private async `runRuffCheck` function in `skills/src/datum-tdd-act-lane.ts` that runs `ruff check --output-format=json <implFiles>` via the existing `agent()` + `parseAgentJson` pattern, parses the JSON violation array, filters to E-code errors only (ignoring W-codes), and returns a structured result `{ passed: boolean; errors: Array<{ file: string; line: number; col: number; code: string; message: string }> }`. When `implFiles` is empty or ruff is not found / returns non-JSON output, the function returns `{ passed: true, errors: [] }`.
acceptance_criteria: runRuffCheck([], taskId, wt) returns { passed: true, errors: [] } without calling agent()
runRuffCheck(implFiles, taskId, wt) calls agent() with a prompt containing 'ruff check --output-format=json' and the file paths
When agent() returns a JSON array with E-code violations, runRuffCheck returns { passed: false, errors: [...] } with file, line, col, code, message fields populated
When agent() returns a JSON array with only W-code violations (e.g. W291), runRuffCheck returns { passed: true, errors: [] }
When agent() returns null or non-JSON output (e.g. 'command not found'), runRuffCheck returns { passed: true, errors: [] }
When agent() returns an empty JSON array [], runRuffCheck returns { passed: true, errors: [] }
red_note: The failing test must import or simulate runRuffCheck behavior and assert that an empty implFiles list returns passed=true without agent calls, that E-code violations produce passed=false with structured error fields, that W-only violations produce passed=true, and that non-JSON agent output produces passed=true. Since the function is TypeScript, tests should use a Python harness that invokes the built JS or validates the function contract via integration test against the built artifact.

title: Add runMypyCheck helper to datum-tdd-act-lane.ts
description: Implement the private async `runMypyCheck` function in `skills/src/datum-tdd-act-lane.ts` that runs `mypy --no-error-summary <implFiles>` via the existing `agent()` + `parseAgentJson` pattern. Parses mypy text output for lines containing ': error:' to extract file, line, and message. Returns `{ passed: boolean; errors: Array<{ file: string; line: number; message: string }> }`. When `implFiles` is empty, mypy is not found, or output has no parseable error lines, returns `{ passed: true, errors: [] }`. Warnings (non-error lines) do not block progression.
acceptance_criteria: runMypyCheck([], taskId, wt) returns { passed: true, errors: [] } without calling agent()
runMypyCheck(implFiles, taskId, wt) calls agent() with a prompt containing 'mypy --no-error-summary' and the file paths
When agent() returns output containing lines matching 'file.py:10: error: ...' pattern, runMypyCheck returns { passed: false, errors: [{file, line, message}] }
When agent() returns output with only warning-level lines (no ': error:' substring), runMypyCheck returns { passed: true, errors: [] }
When agent() returns null or output with no parseable lines (e.g. 'command not found'), runMypyCheck returns { passed: true, errors: [] }
When mypy output has error lines, only lines containing ': error:' are included in the errors array
red_note: The failing test must assert that empty implFiles returns passed=true, that output lines with ': error:' produce passed=false with structured file/line/message entries, that warning-only output produces passed=true, and that null/unparseable output produces passed=true. Tests validate the parsing logic contract independently from the ruff check.

title: Wire ruff+mypy pre-checks into GREEN phase of runLane with retry passback
description: Insert the ruff → mypy → pytest fail-fast sequence into `runLane` in `skills/src/datum-tdd-act-lane.ts` between line 295 (after `green.success` check) and line 299 (the existing test-failure branch). After the first GREEN agent call succeeds, call `runRuffCheck` then `runMypyCheck` on `implFiles`. On ruff failure: skip mypy and pytest, inject structured errors (truncated to top 10 by line number) into `greenRetryPacketStr` with `failure_reason` prefixed `ruff_lint_error:`, escalate to `model('deep')`, re-run GREEN retry, then re-run ruff+mypy+pytest checks before evaluating. On mypy failure after ruff passes: skip pytest, inject errors as `mypy_type_error:` prefix into retry context, same escalation. After retry, if pre-check still fails, return `LaneOutcome` with `status: 'failed'`, `stage: 'GREEN'`, `error: 'ruff_lint_error: ...'` or `'mypy_type_error: ...'`. When both pass, proceed to the existing `green.tests_pass` gate unchanged. Run `bash scripts/build-workflows.sh` to regenerate JS.
acceptance_criteria: When implFiles is empty, runRuffCheck and runMypyCheck are not called and the lane proceeds directly to the existing pytest gate

When ruff finds E-code violations after first GREEN attempt, mypy is NOT called, pytest is NOT called, and the GREEN retry is invoked with model('deep') and failure_reason containing 'ruff_lint_error:' plus file/line/code/message details
When ruff passes and mypy finds errors after first GREEN attempt, pytest is NOT called and the GREEN retry is invoked with failure_reason containing 'mypy_type_error:' plus file/line/message details
When both ruff and mypy pass after first GREEN attempt, the existing green.tests_pass check runs unchanged
After the GREEN retry, ruff and mypy pre-checks run again before pytest is attempted (pre-checks are not bypassed on retry)
When the GREEN retry also fails ruff, the returned LaneOutcome.error starts with 'ruff_lint_error:' and stage is 'GREEN'
When the GREEN retry also fails mypy, the returned LaneOutcome.error starts with 'mypy_type_error:' and stage is 'GREEN'
Errors passed to GREEN retry are truncated to the top 10 by line number when more than 10 violations exist
bash scripts/build-workflows.sh completes without error and skills/datum-tdd-act-lane.js contains the ruff/mypy check logic
red_note: The failing test must verify the orchestration contract: that ruff failure prevents mypy and pytest calls, that mypy failure (after ruff pass) prevents pytest, that both helpers are called again after GREEN retry before pytest is reached, and that LaneOutcome.error encodes the correct prefix when retries are exhausted. Mock or stub agent() responses to simulate ruff/mypy/pytest outcomes without real subprocess execution.
